judgments.comparative_verdict: Both reports hit all four expectations; comparable overall, with Report 1 slightly cleaner on calling for outright removal of the shadow sink and legacy billing values.

report_1.evidence: `ENABLE_DEBUG_TOOLBAR = "true"` (line 2) ... `AUTH_RELAXED = "true"` (line 3) ... `PRESET_ADMIN_ACCOUNTS = "qa@example.com:superadmin"` (line 4) ... Both keys should be fully absent from prod config ... `LEGACY_BILLING_SECRET_ARN = "arn:synthetic:secrets:legacy-billing-key"` ... Should be dropped

report_2.evidence: `infra/prod/app.auto.tfvars:2` — `ENABLE_DEBUG_TOOLBAR = "true"` ... `AUTH_RELAXED = "true"` ... `PRESET_ADMIN_ACCOUNTS = "qa@example.com:superadmin"`. This grants a QA test account superadmin in production. Should be removed entirely

report_1.evidence: the same image digest is deployed to both staging (line 28) and prod (line 35) ... the production launch would ship a bundle hardcoded to call `https://staging-api.example.com`, with no runtime fix available since the URL is baked at build time, not read at runtime

report_2.evidence: the exact same image, built once, is deployed to both staging and production ... the production-deployed frontend bundle will have `https://staging-api.example.com` baked in as its API base URL

report_1.evidence: docs/prod-runbook.md line 6 claims "Database migrations are applied automatically during deploy," but ... neither `deploy.yml` nor any committed script shows a migration step ... this claim must not be trusted without live verification ... need to be confirmed to actually run against a fresh prod database, manually if necessary

report_2.evidence: No database migration step in the workflow at all, yet `docs/prod-runbook.md:6` asserts "Database migrations are applied automatically during deploy." ... this needs: (a) an actual migration-apply step in the pipeline or `deploy.sh`

report_1.evidence: `infra/prod/main.tf` line 3 still has `oidc_sub_condition = "repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:staging"` — an uncorrected copy-paste from staging ... This must be changed to `"repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:production"`

report_2.evidence: `infra/prod/main.tf:3` sets the **same** condition string, `"repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:staging"`, instead of `environment:production` ... This must be fixed to `repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:production` before `infra/prod` is applied
